text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
66 
GAP_DAYS_MO_OS 
LABEL: 
Gap Mail Order Pharmacy — days in other days’ supply 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in an "other" day’s supply of the drugs (other than 1 or 3 
months) on this tier, when using mail order pharmacy during the coverage gap phase of the Part D 
benefit. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: GAP_DAYS_MO_OS 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
CMS
